stories.headline: Congressional home stretch: energy permitting, immigration, crypto on the table
stories.summary: Republicans aim this week to move immigration enforcement and college-sports bills before recess, with possible floor action on housing, energy permitting reform, and crypto taxation as Speaker Mike Johnson negotiates with House hard-liners.

stories.headline: GOP reconciliation crunch week as parliamentarian strikes ballroom funds
stories.summary: Senate GOP leaders aim to pass a $72B ICE/CBP reconciliation package this week (HSGAC markup Tue, Budget markup Wed, vote-a-rama Thu), but the parliamentarian ruled the $1B Secret Service ballroom funding violates the Byrd Rule.

stories.headline: Kentucky's unprecedented primary tests Trump's reach against Massie
stories.summary: Final campaigning day in the Massie–Gallrein GOP primary in Kentucky's 4th District, with Trump rallying voters and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth flying to Hebron for ex-Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein; $30M+ spent including $9M+ from pro-Israel groups.

stories.headline: Collins bets on clout as Platner attacks the system in Maine
stories.summary: Sen. Susan Collins (R-Maine), Senate Appropriations chair, is running on $1.5B steered to Maine over five years, while presumptive Democratic nominee Graham Platner — who beat Gov. Janet Mills — attacks the D.C. establishment.

stories.headline: PA primary tomorrow: Trump-aligned insurgents challenge GOP leaders statewide
stories.summary: Pennsylvania's May 19 primary features the most expensive legislative primary in state history — a Trump-aligned insurgent challenge to a longtime GOP leader in a state Senate district southwest of Pittsburgh, with similar dynamics rippling through other races.

stories.headline: Skill games and sports betting interests pour $8.1M into three GOP state Senate primaries
stories.summary: Gambling interests targeted for new or higher taxes in the 2025 budget fight have spent $8.1M+ ahead of Tuesday's vote, including a deep-dive race in the 48th (Gebhard vs. Crane across Lancaster/Lebanon/Berks) — telegraphing 2026-27 budget revenue dynamics.

stories.headline: Mastriano write-in 'full speed ahead' despite ambassador nomination
stories.summary: State Sen. Doug Mastriano was nominated as a U.S. ambassador, but a write-in effort for him continues in Tuesday's GOP gubernatorial primary against the likely nominee, Treasurer Stacy Garrity.

stories.headline: Steelers OTAs open today; Rodgers expected as O-line and QB depth take center stage
stories.summary: Pittsburgh's organized team activities begin Monday and run through June 12, with newly-signed Aaron Rodgers expected at the first session; only center Zach Frazier and right guard Mason McCormick are locked on the O-line, and a Howard-vs-Allar depth battle is brewing behind Rodgers.

stories.headline: Phillies 6, Pirates 0: Wheeler outduels Skenes at PNC, snapping two Skenes streaks
stories.summary: Zack Wheeler outpitched Paul Skenes in front of 37,820 at PNC Park as Philadelphia handed Pittsburgh a second straight 6-0 loss, snapping two active Skenes streaks; it was the Pirates' second shutout in as many days against the Phillies.

stories.headline: Penguins extend Dewar and Solovyov as offseason opens; Crosby heads to Worlds
stories.summary: Pittsburgh signed pending UFAs forward Connor Dewar and defenseman Ilya Solovyov to extensions with $10.2M in projected cap space; Sidney Crosby joined Team Canada at the IIHF Men's World Championship after the Penguins' first-round exit to Philadelphia.

market_data.as_of: May 18 8:08 a.m. ET (PJM RT); WTI intraday; Henry Hub May 13 spot
